refnamediv.refpurpose: store a list of functions and their inverse

listitem.para: * func = a string vector of functions
* iunvfunc = a string vector of the inverse of these functions
* nothing: string vectors are stored in a database

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Saves into the database functions.dat a string vector of functions and a string of the inverse of these functions.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
